title: Soft Touch Baby Blanket for Newborn, Supersoft Waffle Blankets for Newborn Baby Boys and Girl Blanket. Car Seat, Pram, Cots 0-2 Years. 75 x 100cm
features: Versatile Waffle Throw Blanket for Babies: Our warm, super soft blanket is a key baby essential serving as an all-in-one solution. Perfect as a cot blanket, pram blanket, or playmat for both baby boys and baby girls alike. Our clients love these for their fur babies too!

Ultimate Soft Snuggly Blanket: Experience unparalleled comfort with our fluffy 100% polyester blanket. This super soft material is designed specifically for snuggling your newborn, providing a cosy and warm embrace for your little one.

All Year Round at Home and On The Go: This warm blanket for baby keeps your newborn snug while preventing overheating. Our so soft waffle blanket ensures comfortable and restful sleep throughout every season. Perfect for toddlers and pets too.

Thoughtful Gift Choice: Our cosy waffle throw blanket is an ideal gift for new parents of baby boys or baby girls. This super soft newborn blanket combines practicality and stylish design, perfect for baby showers
Easy Care: Machine washable and durable, this warm, fluffy throw maintains its softness and shape. Our great quality waffle blanket simplifies busy parenting with its easy-care properties.
description: Product Description Super Soft Quality With 11 different colours to choose from Reasons to buy the Soft Touch Waffle Wrap: Exceptional quality with great value for money Wide range of colours and styles to choose from Over 100,000 pieces sold. Testament to the quality and popularity of this baby wrap Supplied by a trusted British brand Product Information Machine Washable Made from 100% Polyester For use by babies, toddlers and pets Single layer wrap for comfort and breathability Why Choose Soft Touch? Trusted British Brand with over 35 years experience in the industry Innovative, unique designs that often set the market trends Quality comes first to ensure you get the best value for money Dependable service with products stocked in independent stores nationwide and on Amazon Product Specification Size Wrap dimensions: 75 cm x 100 cm Material Composition 100% Polyester Care Instructions Machine Washable (ALWAYS READ THE CARE LABEL) Manufacturer Reference FBP152 Manufacturer Name Tillfield Limited Brand Name Soft Touch Perfect for year-round use With so many colours to choose from, this item is sure to make the perfect gift for all occasions.
